project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite budget tracker SPA
build_system: Vite with @vitejs/plugin-react and @tailwindcss/vite. Build: tsc -b && vite build
test_framework: No test framework configured. No test files exist.
test_command: No test command available (no test framework). Verify via npm run build (TypeScript compilation + Vite bundle).
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to install deps. 2. Run npm run build to confirm TypeScript compiles cleanly and Vite bundles. 3. Verify no type errors in the new Firebase code.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm access. No Docker needed. No test runner.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Follow existing patterns: functional components, hooks, Tailwind CSS v4 with dark mode, responsive design, semantic HTML.
key_patterns: State management via custom hooks (useLocalStorage, useTheme). AppState interface holds contributions[] and expenses[]. Dashboard receives state/setState/resetState as props. All CRUD done via setState updater functions in Dashboard. Role-based UI (leader can write, viewer is read-only). Tailwind v4 with @import 'tailwindcss' and @custom-variant dark. TypeScript strict mode with noUnusedLocals/noUnusedParameters.
directory_structure: src/ - main app code. src/components/ - React components (Dashboard, forms, lists, etc). src/hooks/ - custom hooks (useLocalStorage, useTheme). src/utils/ - helper functions (formatCurrency). public/ - static assets.
